member.name: T:TransactionId
member.summary:
The client-generated ID for a transaction.

This is used for retrieving receipts and records for a transaction, for appending to a file right after creating it, for instantiating a smart contract with bytecode in a file just created, and internally by the network for detecting when duplicate transactions are submitted.

member.name: M:TransactionId.#ctor(AccountId,DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: No longer part of the public API. Use `Transaction.withValidStart()` instead.
member.param: the account id
the valid start time

member.name: M:TransactionId.Generate(AccountId)
member.summary:
Generates a new transaction ID for the given account ID.

Note that transaction IDs are made of the valid start of the transaction and the account that will be charged the transaction fees for the transaction.

the ID of the Hedera account that will be charge the transaction fees. {@link TransactionId}

member.name: M:TransactionId.WithValidStart(AccountId,DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Create a transaction id.
member.param: the account id
the valid start time

member.name: M:TransactionId.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Create a new transaction id from a string.
member.param: the string representing the transaction id

member.name: M:TransactionId.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a new transaction id from a byte array.
member.param: the byte array
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TransactionId.FromProtobuf(Proto.TransactionId)
member.summary: Create a transaction id from a protobuf.
member.param: the protobuf

member.name: P:TransactionId.Nonce
member.summary: Extract the nonce.

member.name: P:TransactionId.Scheduled
member.summary: Extract the scheduled status.

member.name: P:TransactionId.AccountId
member.summary: The Account ID that paid for this transaction.

member.name: P:TransactionId.ValidStart
member.summary:
The time from when this transaction is valid.

When a transaction is submitted there is additionally a validDuration (defaults to 120s) and together they define a time window that a transaction may be processed in.

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetReceipt(Client)
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the receipt

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetReceipt(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the receipt

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetReceiptAsync(Client)
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
member.returns: future result of the transaction receipt

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.Action{TransactionReceipt,System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{TransactionReceipt,System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.Action{TransactionReceipt},System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{TransactionReceipt},System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetRecord(Client)
member.summary: Fetch the record of the transaction.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the receipt

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetRecord(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Fetch the record of the transaction.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the receipt

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetRecordAsync(Client)
member.summary: Fetch the record of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
member.returns: future result of the transaction record

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetRecordAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Fetch the record of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
member.returns: future result of the transaction record

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetRecordAsync(Client,System.Action{TransactionRecord,System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the record of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetRecordAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{TransactionRecord,System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the record of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:TransactionId.GetRecordAsync(Client,System.Action{TransactionRecord},System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the record of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.summary: Fetch the record of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:TransactionId.ToBytes
member.summary: Extract the byte array representation.

member.name: M:TransactionId.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Extract the transaction id protobuf.

member.name: M:TransactionId.ToStringWithChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Convert to a string representation with checksum.
member.param: the configured client
